scenarios.description: children() on element with no child nodes returns empty Elements (childNodeSize()==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children

scenarios.description: children() on element with single Element child builds list via loop once (childNodeSize()>0, shadowChildrenRef==null, one iteration)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendElement("span"); // one element child
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list has size 1 and contains the span child

scenarios.description: children() on element with mixed Node children filters only Element instances (childNodeSize()>0, shadowChildrenRef==null, multiple iterations)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); parent.appendElement("p"); parent.appendChild(new Comment("cmt"));
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Elements list has size 1 and contains only the

element

scenarios.description: children() uses cached shadowChildrenRef on second call (shadowChildrenRef!=null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element c = parent.appendElement("a"); parent.children(); // prime cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second call to children() returns list of size 1 containing the same cached child
